calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference hearing this day in Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: V.Mack, Reporter: Carlita Mandia CSR 689
Appearances:
Michael Carrillo Hall, Esq., for and with Plaintiff Harvey Woo
Bernard Cousart, Defendant in Pro Per.
Parties met with Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis in Dept. 306A. The case settled and the parties entered into a settlement agreement and Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or, in the alternative, Dismissal as follows:
Defendant to vacate premises located at 154 - 10th Street, #4, San Francisco, CA by JAN-05-2004, along with any other occupants. Unpaid rent for December 2003 in the amount of $920.00 shall be paid by DEC-05-2003. The remaining back rent and damages in the amount of $2,760.00 is to be paid in installments of at least $200.00 per month commencing JAN-21-2004 until paid. If defendant vacates and pays according to agreed upon terms, Plaintiff will file a dismissal with prejudice within 10 days of completion of terms. If Defendant does not comply, Plaintiff shall be entitled to immediate entry of Judgment, by ex parte declaration, according to the Rules of Court. Defendant waives right to seek stay of execution. The security deposit of $500.00 will be applied and/or distributed as required by law; Defendant does not waive his right to the security deposit. Defendant further waives all rights to claims under Civil Code 1542, except as to enforcement of the settlement agreement. Defendant will be noticed of dismissal of this action by Plaintiff. Judge Pro Tem Jungreis conducted voir dire with both parties and parties agreed to terms of the settlement in open court and on the record.
